posts.text:
FISA is a critical tool that allows Treasury to stop terrorists from utilizing the financial system to carry out attacks against the United States and continues to be a critical component of our national and economic security. 

It is the most important tool we have to collect information on our adversaries including Iran and Hamas.

Congressional Democrats should stop playing politics with the safety and security of the American people.
posts.author: zerohedge
